title: Greedy Algorithms and Exchange Arguments · Invariant Lens: Greedy Choice
summary: Allocate rooms, bandwidth, and deadlines under competing local choices. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 greedy choice increment in a greedy-design decision and proof notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define a locally optimal choice and the remaining subproblem precisely.
Distinguish minimum construction cost from shortest routes, resilience, and capacity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
